ambiguities.requirement: The system shall allow users to apply for more certificates as needed.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall register a new user.
The system shall end the process if registration details are not accepted.
The system shall allow a user to log in after successful registration.
The system shall provide multiple login attempts if the details are incorrect.
The system shall allow the user to continue applying or finish once a certificate request is processed.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If the registration details are not accepted, it ends there.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall end the process if registration details are not accepted.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: After logging in, the person can cancel a certificate, apply for certificates, view the profile, or update the profile.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow the user to cancel a certificate, apply for certificates, view their profile, or update their profile after logging in.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the request is processed and the certificate is issued, they can continue applying again or finish there.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow the user to continue applying or finish once a certificate request is processed.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall register a new user.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not mention registering a new user, but rather starting by registering an existing person.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall provide multiple login attempts if the details are incorrect.
hallucinations.reason: The source text mentions trying again until the login is successful, but it does not specify providing multiple attempts.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall allow users to apply for more certificates as needed.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall allow the user to continue applying or finish once a certificate request is processed.
duplicates.reason: Both requirements essentially cover the same functionality of allowing further application after processing.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall require the user to fill in the form and upload required details when applying for certificates.
ambiguities.reason: It is not clear from the source text whether filling out a form and uploading details are mandatory steps.
